reviews.comment:
Excelente!! No siendo socia me ayudaron a solucionar mi problema, llamaron a un mecánico del pueblo y encontró el inconveniente! Gente que está al servicio de quién llegue!! Excelente! Ya quedan pocas personas así! Un 10!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!! Not being a member, they helped me solve my problem. They called a local mechanic and he found the problem! People who are there for whoever comes! Excellent! Few people like that left! A 10/10!

reviews.comment:
Atiende bien como siempre.A la entrada volvien desde Mar del Plata hay un puesto de venta de quesos y salames independiente de Aca, creo.Compramos y resultaron muy buenos. Y pan casero!

(Translated by Google)
The service is great, as always. At the entrance on the way back from Mar del Plata, there's a stand selling cheese and salami, independent of local origin, I think. We bought some, and it turned out great. And homemade bread!
